question: How do you remove and replace the booklet-maker accessory staple cartridge in the floor-standing finisher?
answer: First, pull out the booklet finisher assembly until it stops. Then, pull the colored tabs away from the assembly and up to remove the two staple cartridges. Next, push in the two blue tabs and lift up to open the top of the staple cartridge carriage. Lift two tabs on each empty staple cartridge and lift them up to remove them from the carriages (do not discard the carriages). Insert new staple cartridges into the carriages and close the top of the carriers. Reinstall the carriages by pressing the colored handles until they snap into place, slide the booklet assembly back in, and finally close the finisher front door.

system_role: You are a helpful HP printer technician.
question: What is the procedure for configuring fax features via the control panel?
answer: To configure the fax features, navigate through the menu to 'Fax' and then select 'Internal Fax Modem Setup'. If this menu does not appear, it may be because LAN or Internet fax is enabled; in that case, use the HP Embedded Web Server to disable the other fax type so analog fax can be used. Once inside the setup wizard, follow these steps: 1) Select a location from the list and select Next. 2) Enter your company name in the Company Name text field using the keypad and press Next. 3) Enter the sending fax number in the Fax Number text field and press Next. 4) Verify that date and time settings are correct, make changes if necessary, and then select Next. 5) If a dialing prefix is required for sending faxes, enter it in the Dialing Prefix text field using the keypad. Finally, review all information on the left pane and select Finish to complete the setup.
